problem id: bfca784f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) XOR NOT SHL(3)) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  11000000 -> 11111011
  11011100 -> 11011011
  10110110 -> 00110110
  00010100 -> 00011110
  11001101 -> 01011011
  00110001 -> 01100110
  01110101 -> 00001110
  10000001 -> 11111111
  00011110 -> 11101111
  11100001 -> 11111101

query: 11111101
predicted answer: 11011111
